key.name: tabby-toggle-group
key.description: Group all windows of the focused app as tabs, or ungroup if already grouped

key.name: tabby-next-tab
key.description: Switch to next tab in the group

key.name: tabby-prev-tab
key.description: Switch to previous tab in the group

key.name: tabby-close-tab
key.description: Remove current window from tab group
